items.title: Get up to $3,300 flash savings on Anker’s SOLIX E10 smart hybrid backup system + solar generator bundles from $4,299
items.summary:
Anker SOLIX is currently offering a flash sale on its newest E10 Smart Hybrid Whole-Home Backup System and its available bundles with up to $3,300 savings and a FREE 400W solar panel all starting from $4,299 shipped, beating its Amazon pricing by $500. This base starting package normally goes for $5,799 at full price since its release back at the top of February. The initial launch deal we saw offered the same prices but with a larger $1,346 package of free gear, with that free gear being dropped in March, while discounts remained the same. Now, you’re looking at the second-best package attached at the lowest prices we have tracked once more, giving you a $1,500 price cut ($2,399 total savings with the free solar panel) that is only lasting for the rest of the day. Head below to learn more about this system and browse all the additional bundle offers. You can also find the brand’s many power stations benefitting from discounts on the main Power Deals page here (with an exclusive bonus 5% savings on orders over $1,000 using the code 9TO5DEALS5 at checkout).

items.title: New Switch 2 Mario Galaxy bundle announced, but you can score a deal on the game right now
items.summary:
Nintendo has been making headlines as of late after what appeared to be its entire 2026 launch schedule leaked online (details here). However, it does look as though one thing didn’t slip through the warp pipes as it has just announced a new limited-time Super Mario Galaxy Switch 2 console bundle offer. Starting next week, you’ll be able to buy a Switch 2 and Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 at just about all major retailers with a $20 discount. That’s not much, but it is something, and if you already own a Switch 2 you can land a deal on Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 right now anyway: Woot has the proper U.S. boxed version down at $58.99 right now and the international version down at $54.99 Prime shipped. The International copy works on U.S. consoles, but you might bump into some issues if there was an DLC for the game in question (updates appear to work just fine). 

New Mario Bros. 40th anniversary collectible game cases, FREE poster, more surface at Best Buy and Target

Nintendo’s entire 2026 launch plans have leaked: Upcoming Switch 2 games, Direct details, 3D Mario, more
